seo_title: 3 New Ways Ads Advisor is Making Google Ads Safer and Faster
meta_description: Discover how Google's latest Ads Advisor updates are enhancing the safety and efficiency of your Google Ads account.
body_html:
Direct answer: Google's Ads Advisor is now integrating three new agentic safety and policy features to protect and streamline your Google Ads account.

Streamlined Account ManagementAutomated account audits to detect potential issues earlyReal-time alerts for suspicious activityCustomizable account settings for enhanced securityFaster Ad Review ProcessFeatureDescriptionAI-powered ad reviewAccurate and efficient ad review with minimal human interventionAutomated ad approvalFast-tracked ad approvals for approved advertisersAd performance analysisData-driven insights to optimize ad campaignsEnhanced Safety FeaturesGoogle's commitment to user safety is enhanced with the integration of these new features, ensuring a secure and trustworthy advertising experience.

source.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
source.summary: The Road to Google Marketing Live graphic. May 20, 2026, 9am PT. White background with colorful bottom gradient.
